title: corchorus schimperi
intro: Corchorus schimperi, also known as the Spurred Corchorus or Spurred Jute, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Corchorus schimperi include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine as a paste or cream for topical application.
